title: Local ChatGPT review to Codex continuation loop

intent.outcome: Implement the complete repo-local, deterministic ChatGPT-review-to-exact-Codex-session continuation loop required by GitHub issue #2290.
non_goals: Do not add or change shipped Agentic Workspace package or generated payload surfaces.
Do not perform model-based review, reinterpret external review decisions, merge pull requests, or guess a Codex session.
Do not claim final issue closure without representative live-cycle dogfooding evidence.

parent.contribution: Deliver the repo-maintainer transport loop and its deterministic proof surfaces.
parent.closure_boundary: Issue #2290 implementation; live external-review dogfooding remains an explicit completion gate.

effects: Writes runtime state only below the already-gitignored .agentic-workspace/local directory.
Uses authenticated gh for deterministic PR metadata/comments and codex resume with an exact recorded session ID.
Adds a trusted project-local Stop hook that performs only bounded handoff recording.

next_action: Keep the activated watcher running for PR #2292 head 67c3cce4; verify the next external review resumes this exact Codex session, records a corrective head through the Stop hook, and continues to the subsequent review without manual watcher restart.

claims: The local controller records exact handoffs, opts in PRs, parses only PR-and-full-SHA-bound markers, resumes blockers once, and fails safely for ambiguous or stale states.
Merge-ready records readiness without merging; iteration and repeated-blocker limits escalate to a human.
Runtime state remains local/gitignored and no shipped package or generated payload surface changes.
requirements: uv run ruff check tools/chatgpt_review_loop.py tests/test_chatgpt_review_loop.py
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json
Inspect git diff to confirm shipped payload and generated surfaces are unchanged.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Only the scope.owned paths listed above; runtime fixtures use temporary directories.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Eight owned files, including Planning state and this plan.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: Focused pytest, Ruff, maintainer/agent-aid checks, git diff checks, and AW routed proof.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Stop before changing Agentic Workspace runtime, package contracts, generated output, or the external review policy skill.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Credentials, Codex transcript contents, user-global Codex config, shipped payload mirrors, or merge automation.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check tools/chatgpt_review_loop.py tests/test_chatgpt_review_loop.py
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json
completion_criteria: All issue #2290 deterministic transport acceptance criteria are implemented and covered by focused tests.
The ordinary Stop-hook handoff is bounded, idempotent, non-waiting, and exact-session-bound.
The controller supports inspect, stop, cleanup, and explicit recovery without silent retries or routing guesses.
Maintainer documentation covers setup, trust, permissions, operation, inspection, stopping, cleanup, and recovery.
A dogfooding report honestly distinguishes simulated deterministic proof from live external-review evidence.
No shipped Agentic Workspace or generated package surface changes.

execution_run.what happened: Added a dormant project Stop hook, explicit handoff command, gitignored local state machine, model-free GitHub poller, exact-session one-shot resume, bounded recovery/limits, focused tests, maintainer docs, and an honest dogfooding report.
execution_run.changed surfaces: tools/chatgpt_review_loop.py; .codex/hooks.json; tests/test_chatgpt_review_loop.py; docs/maintainer/chatgpt-review-continuation.md; docs/maintainer/maintainer-commands.md; docs/reviews/aw-chatgpt-review-continuation-dogfood-2026-07-14.md; this plan; Planning selection state.
execution_run.result for continuation: PR #2292 supplied one real blocked review. The pre-activation exact-session resume failed once, its watcher-continuation blocker is fixed, and the replacement watcher is running with reviewed-hook activation.
execution_run.next step: Let the activated watcher consume the next current-head review and record the exact-session Stop-hook handoff evidence.

proof_report.validation proof: Focused controller suite: 16 passed, including a two-head unattended watch cycle and hook-trust activation command; Ruff: passed; real Windows Stop-hook smoke: passed; git check-ignore confirmed local runtime state; workspace lint and maintainer surfaces passed; PR #2292 CI passed through head ad37e10d and current-head CI is running; the earlier full workspace suite had 1334 passed, 2 skipped, and 1 unrelated structured-file inventory failure caused by six pre-existing unstaged Planning deletions.
proof_report.proof achieved now: Deterministic two-head proof and one real external blocked review achieved. The first pre-activation exact-session resume failed once; the activated replacement watcher is awaiting a current-head review to prove automatic Stop-hook handoff and subsequent-review continuation.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: All deterministic transport surfaces and focused acceptance tests are implemented; the issue's mandatory live representative-PR dogfooding gate is not yet satisfied.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Do not close #2290 or consider automatic merge until several live external-review cycles establish latency, successful exact-session continuation, intervention rate, and blocker quality.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: GitHub #2290 and the checked-in dogfooding report
durable_residue.promotion trigger: representative live PR evidence is collected

signals found.summary: Issue-scoped external-intent refresh emitted broad unrelated planning-candidate and grouping payload.

signals fixed.summary: Bare python was unavailable in the real Windows hook environment; changed the checked-in hook and docs to the configured uv run python runtime.
Real gh comments use GraphQL string IDs; preserved those IDs verbatim instead of coercing them to integers.
signals fixed.source: read-only real PR comment payload inspection
